hero.intro: I'm Wensheng Chen; I go by Wilson. Previously CTO at The Juicy Crab; now building [bestpos.io](https://bestpos.io), [kloudeats.com](https://kloudeats.com), and AI-powered developer tools.
paragraphs: I am currently exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence and developer tools — encoding context and voice so agents execute as thought partners, and defaulting to static-first systems that stay fast and predictable.

My primary focus is reducing friction between intention and execution: context-aware agents, spec-first workflows where the bottleneck is articulation not implementation, and tooling that closes the gap without adding new abstractions.

aboutLink.label: More about me and my philosophy

currentFocus.title: Current Focus & Problems
currentFocus.description: What I'm obsessed with now and the problems I believe matter.
paragraphs: The core problem I am obsessed with is knowledge fragmentation and missing context. We have more tools than ever, yet context is lost across platforms — and when we hand work to agents, they default to generic output because they don't have our voice and constraints encoded.

I believe the next wave will come from unifying context into seamless workflows and from encoding procedural knowledge so that agents and tools act as thought partners. The bottleneck has moved from execution to articulation; the developers who think most clearly will have the edge.
